title: Open Redirect in /auth/callback
description: The redirect_url parameter in /auth/callback is not validated against a whitelist, allowing attackers to send users to phishing pages after a legitimate login flow.

name: Insecure Deserialization in session handler
details: The session middleware deserializes pickle-encoded cookies without integrity verification, allowing remote code execution if an attacker controls the cookie.

rule: Weak random number generator used for password reset tokens
message: Math.random() is used to generate password reset tokens. Predictable tokens allow account takeover.
